assumptions.accountNote: User: ~$2k risk book, trying ~$10 moves on SOXL

gates.label: Size ≤ consistency cap
gates.detail: Typical 7 sh vs cap 3 sh (1% equity ÷ $10 stop)

gates.label: 2 clean process weeks
gates.detail: Manual: written rules followed, no revenge size, no junk overnight — not auto-passed from P&L

headline: Do not size up — typical 7 sh is already above the 3 sh consistency cap.
guidance: For ~$3881 equity and a ~$10/share SOXL stop, 1% risk ⇒ ~3 shares. You are averaging ~7.
Growth path: trade A-setups at ≤3–5 sh until process weeks clear, then +1–2 shares.
>15m SOXL is the engine ($352); ≤15m is a drag ($-73). Only size the first.
Unbiased rule: size follows measured edge + rule adherence, never a green day or a $10 target fantasy.
